Bash(# liquidslr/interview-company-wise-problems - look inside a company directory

import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for item in data[:10]:
    print\(f\\"{item['type']:6s} {item['name']}\\"\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(# krishnadey30/LeetCode-Questions-CompanyWise - try different filenames
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/krishnadey30/LeetCode-Questions-CompanyWise/git/trees/main?recursive=1" | /c/Users/amiar/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe -c "

data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
paths = [t['path'] for t in data.get\('tree',[]\) if t['path'].endswith\('.csv'\)]
for p in paths[:10]:
    print\(p\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(# snehasishroy - check default branch
curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/snehasishroy/leetcode-companywise-interview-questions" | /c/Users/amiar/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python312/python.exe -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f\\"Default branch: {data.get\('default_branch'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Stars: {data.get\('stargazers_count'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Updated: {data.get\('updated_at'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Pushed: {data.get\('pushed_at'\)}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Description: {data.get\('description'\)}\\"\)
" 2>&1)
